
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{"name":"CONSULTANCY"},{},{}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"}},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
